options.why: Used a vinculum; the house convention marks a single repeating digit with a dot, not a bar.
Wrote a terminating decimal, dropping the repeat entirely.
Marked two digits as repeating, but only the single digit $7$ recurs.
Marked only the $8$ as repeating, but the whole block $28$ recurs.
Barred three digits, but the repeating block is the two digits $28$.
Wrote a terminating decimal, dropping the repeat entirely.
Marked the $3$ as repeating too, but the $3$ is a fixed leading digit and only $5$ recurs.
